category_sources: source_facts.description says embedded scripting language for Rust; official rhai.rs homepage describes an embedded scripting language and engine for Rust.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rhai; official homepage and docs use Rhai as the project name.
docs_sources: Official rhai.rs homepage links The Rhai Book; docs.rs page for the crate also points to the online documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rhaiscript/rhai; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies embedded Rust scripting; official homepage mentions Rust integration, common targets including no-std and WASM, and the rhai-run executable is in source_facts.executables.
